description: Google Wallet lets issuers create and manage digital passes and related wallet objects such as event tickets, boarding passes, loyalty cards, gift cards, offers, transit passes, and generic passes. The service is operated by Google for businesses integrating pass issuance into Google Wallet.
summary: walletobjects.googleapis.com exposes the Google Wallet REST API at https://walletobjects.googleapis.com/ plus a documented Google Wallet MCP surface; the REST API requires Google OAuth 2.0 access tokens with the Wallet issuer scope, while MCP auth details were not exposed on the pages scraped.
